date_field_consistency.comparison: date versus timestamp converted to Asia/Shanghai calendar date
date versus timestamp converted to Asia/Shanghai calendar date

parser_note.reason: The default pandas C parser overflows and the Python parser misreads embedded bare CR bytes as extra records.

target_deduplication_audit.formal_rule: drop exact duplicate rows; exclude (user_id, video_id, timestamp) keys with conflicting binary watch_ratio>2 labels; collapse every remaining positive key to one canonical target

pre_catalog_target_deduplication_audit.formal_rule: drop exact duplicate rows; exclude (user_id, video_id, timestamp) keys with conflicting binary watch_ratio>2 labels; collapse every remaining positive key to one canonical target

small_matrix_observation_coverage.official_missing_pair_semantics: user blocked the video or its author; inferred only at pair level
small_matrix_observation_coverage.primary_policy: exclude each user's blocked/missing pairs; rank only physically observed pairs, including observed nonpositive pairs
small_matrix_observation_coverage.secondary_safety_policy: rank all 3327 videos only to report Blocked@K and BlockedUserHitRate@K; never claim it as primary model quality

candidate_catalog_audit.snapshot_rule: latest item_daily_features row with date < query local date
candidate_catalog_audit.upload_rule: upload_dt local date < query local date
candidate_catalog_audit.advertisement_policy: exclude AD from the primary recommendation task

candidate_size_audit.rule: per-query causal NORMAL/public/uploaded catalog; remove all items observed strictly before query; score before consuming equal timestamp

hard_negative_pool_audit.future_window: query_time < event_time <= query_time+30m and event_time < train_end; same session; never reads validation for a train query

validation.data_warm_definition: at least one Big Matrix interaction in the context reference

temporal_final.data_warm_definition: at least one Big Matrix interaction in the context reference

small_matrix.data_warm_definition: at least one Big Matrix interaction in the context reference

cold_start_context_audit.untrained_id_policy: an ID embedding may be used only if optimization actually touched it; otherwise use the content-only/UNK fallback

metadata_coverage.catalog_definition: union of video_id in big_matrix and small_matrix

baseline_cost_estimates.disclaimer: Planning estimates only; no baseline was executed in Phase 0. Temporal query count uses exact (user_id, next-positive timestamp) groups.

random.expected_compute: under 5 CPU minutes with direct seeded top-K sampling

global_popularity.evaluation_scale: one shared ranking plus per-user seen filtering

time_decayed_popularity.evaluation_scale: state update plus shared ranking at query times

itemcf.fit_scale: sparse co-occurrence from 658,907 strong positives over at most 10,728 videos
itemcf.evaluation_scale: history-neighbor aggregation for every temporal query
itemcf.expected_compute: roughly 10-60 CPU minutes and 1-4 GB working memory

bpr_mf.fit_scale: pre-registered 10 epochs = about 6,589,070 positive-pair updates before batching
bpr_mf.expected_compute: roughly 30-120 CPU minutes or 5-20 GPU minutes
